# Verite Producciones — Shoot In Panama

> Full-service film & video production-services company in Panama for international productions: crew, permits, locations, logistics, customs and the 25% Film Law cash rebate. Operating since 1993 (30+ years). English-speaking, US-dollar economy, the Hub of the Americas.

## About
Verite Producciones ("Shoot In Panama") is the ground team behind international features, series and campaigns filming in Panama — CBS's The Amazing Race, Discovery's Survive the Raft, MTV's The Challenge, Netflix's ARP, NBC's Today Show, four MrBeast productions, an IMAX feature on the Panama Canal, and the OAS 56th General Assembly (Panama 2026). The same crew scouts locations, clears permits and runs the days.

## Services
- Production Services — full crew, equipment and location management, first scout to final wrap.
- Fixer & Logistics — permits, talent coordination, transport and on-ground support nationwide.
- Executive Compliance — legal setup, insurance, customs and regulatory clearance for foreign productions.
- Government Incentives — 25% cash rebate (Film Law 16), 0% import duty, single-window permitting.

## Government incentive (Film Law 16)
Panama returns 25% of qualifying in-country spend as cash. Minimum qualifying spend $500,000 USD; cap $25M per project; a certified (CPA) compliance audit is mandatory; disbursement can take up to 36 months after the audit closes. Verite is a licensed local partner that structures the spend and files the claim.

## Why Panama
Caribbean and Pacific coasts about an hour apart (82 km at the narrowest); jungle, colonial old town (Casco Viejo), modern skyline and the Panama Canal; ~270 filming days a year; direct flights to 90 cities across the Americas (17 in the US) and several in Europe.

## Contact
